member.name: T:Jewelix.Logging.Tests.DependencyInjectionTests
member.summary: Tests for : DI registration of , replacement of the default ILogger<> registration, and null-argument guard behaviour.

member.name: T:Jewelix.Logging.Tests.Helper.InMemorySink
member.summary: Captures emitted Serilog events in memory so tests can assert against them. Thread-safe so middleware tests on TestServer don't race with the test thread.

member.name: P:Jewelix.Logging.Tests.Helper.InMemorySink.Events
member.summary: Returns a snapshot of all log events captured since this sink was created.

member.name: M:Jewelix.Logging.Tests.Helper.InMemorySink.Emit(Serilog.Events.LogEvent)
member.summary: Appends to the in-memory event list.

member.name: T:Jewelix.Logging.Tests.Helper.SerilogTestCollection
member.summary: xUnit collection definition that enforces sequential execution for all tests in the "Serilog" collection. Required because those tests mutate the static Log.Logger — parallel execution would race on the global sink.

member.name: T:Jewelix.Logging.Tests.LoggerMiddlewareTests
member.summary: Tests for : correlation ID generation and propagation, HTTP summary event emission, request/response body capture at Debug level, and sensitive field masking. Uses an in-process TestServer to drive real HTTP requests through the middleware pipeline.

member.name: T:Jewelix.Logging.Tests.SanitizeTests
member.summary: Tests for : empty-input handling, masking of known sensitive JSON fields (password, token, secret, creditCard, apiKey), case-insensitive matching, preservation of non-sensitive fields, and truncation of payloads that exceed the maximum logging length.

member.name: T:Jewelix.Logging.Tests.SerilogLoggerTests
member.summary: Tests for : log-level mapping from Microsoft.Extensions.Logging to Serilog, exception attachment, SourceContext stamping, and None-level suppression.

member.name: T:Jewelix.Logging.Tests.UseJewelixLoggerTests
member.summary: Tests for : Serilog logger configuration from an appsettings.json-style in-memory configuration, middleware pipeline registration, and null-argument guard behaviour.
